reviews.review_title: Very Fun Game - Updated After Bug Fix
reviews.review_description:
So original when I first played this game it was actually fun and interesting but I encountered a glitch where I where I stopped getting quests effectively soft locking me.

Thankfully since the first time I played the game the Devs have addressed this soft locking issue and it is now fixed as of February 2026. And now I’m able to progress and enjoy the game to its fullest potential.

I enjoy using all the different materials to create all sorts of tools and weapons. There are some issues where it is hard to carve wood exactly how you want to and it can be to forge wood and metal together without it looking weird or unaligned. Thankfully even with these issues the game is still fun and it has no effect on your progression, so overall I rate this game a total of 5 golden stars.

My original review wasn't brutal enough to detail exactly how broken this empty promise of a game really is and instead of rewriting it and explaining my problems with the devs that I had to deal with, I'm just going to leave this here like this:

if you ever wanted to know what it's like to burn money in a fire, buy this game. They sucker you with a Califer-ian pet but petting it is all you can really do with it and it only moves in one way.

The tools don't work, not a skill issue. You can't make perfect edges. YOU CAN NOT. Not a skill issue. You can not make the stuff you want and you don't get paid. You have to sell your own stuff to the merchant but your jobs don't pay.

Game can't register what is a sword or a spear. Why not make it an option to select what type of weapon you're making so the game doesn't mistakenly register the wrong thing. Graffiti Kingdom figured this out on PS2, how are you failing miserably?

Now if you’re that type of person that’s got time on your hands and want something to play and mess around a little bit in. Ignore all of these bad reviews. I thought this game was going to be terrible and I bought it and turns out it was really good, fun little game that I think is worth it. I certainly enjoy it and can’t complain. Definitely needs like a shop and currency system. And also maybe a little less sensitive when it comes down to hitting and shaping, i definitely want to see how these deevelpors can fix this game up. Keep it up👍

reviews.review_title: These reviews are lies! Great Game
reviews.review_description: At first I read the reviews of this game and I was like okay maybe I won't buy it but then I got a really good deal and was like why not if I don't like it I'll return it, turns out these people were big fat liars! This game is great and 100% worth it. I would've paid full price for this game if I knew it was this good. Such cute graphics too

reviews.review_title: Maybe needs better stuff for metal
reviews.review_description: So when I was forging I just thought the hammer was too much it was to big and to much for just little taps and when I’m making a pickaxe it’s hard to get in those tight spots and hard to get in the tight spots for the grinder so maybe just maybe you could add a little hammer for forging metals a tinnier version of the grinder?

reviews.review_title: Game is cute but the gameplay just… isn'
reviews.review_description: The game is beautiful visually but the gameplay is lacking… everything tbh

Too buggy. From haptics being stuck on vibrate to game crashing after an hour of work so no progress is ever made. Edge alignment of tools are off, hammer is too big to be precise, and hammering just removes the material, instead of pusing the material. At the current state, pretty unplayable
I just started and bought it on sale thinking they fixed bugs people complain about. 10 minutes in and I can't open the mailbox. Wtf?

I love the idea of a blacksmith vr game but I was so disappointed with this game sure it’s fun for the first two weapons but after that it just feels sluggish and boring and how it’s almost impossible to make a good weapon and it feels horrible to hit the metal also it is impossible to shape the metal well enough to make a halfway decent game so in conclusion DO NOT BUY THIS GAME UNDER ANY 
CIRCUMSTANCE 
￼
Fun
This game cannot recognize a pointy or blunt weapon and auto makes an edge so it is nearly impossible to satisfy customers who want something like a spear or hammer

reviews.review_title: Tried to get into it and i cant
reviews.review_description: Got the game expecting at least decent forging mechanics and no, when you hit stuff it doesn't bend it takes away material and it super annoying.

reviews.review_title: Half of the tools just don't work
reviews.review_description: A lot of the game is broken and the rest is so jank that id rather play any other game that has even a little bit of smithing. This game should be a free tech demo not 20 bucks

It starts out as a great game then you begin to see bug after bug, until you are completly soft locked and you have to start all over. Do not get this game! you will be trapped into thinking it is a good game until the refund deadline then you wont be able to get your money back once you relize its a glitchy mess.
Why is the flatening methode sphereacal and not a squere like bro the hammer is not round its flat it should be at least a option to switch between ways to flatend the metal
Can you add multiplayer plezz

The gameplay itself is fine, however the quests get repetitive and the blade type detection really needs work. Whenever I try to make a sword it attacks like a spear, and spears attack like blunt items.  The trial and error needed to get even one order done is frustrating enough to make me stop playing. I haventeven unlocked much, just oak wood and tin, but I would rather play something that isn't annoying.
As a side note, this game gives me motion sickness after playing for a few minutes, I think its because Im on quest 2 and the performance is lacking a bit causing frame stuttering.

I really want to like this game but it fights you the whole time you play, at least from my experience.

You can easily make other weapons, game auto sets an edge when hammering so blunt weapons are a pain, or swords and spears, they are just a little to similar.
 The way I think they could fix it is a hand sharpener, you get it at the start of the game right next to the grindstone, it could set and edge or remove it. I personally would love to have this, would make Smithing funnier.

I love the game but so times the game won't give me mission to do stuff and I have to reset the save just for it to work. I tired reloading the save, closing the add and, just waiting for the guy to show up to give me nothing to do.
I'm not sure why, and this doesn't happen with any of my other games, but this one somehow keeps disconnecting my controllers, or turning them off, and I get stuck unless I wildly shake them around.

reviews.review_title: It's got charm, just a few tweaks
reviews.review_description: So basically, the hammering and grindstone are clunky, every so often it'll crash when I do something with a certain creation and when it crashes all my progress is lost and I'm barely able to make it again cause the point on my creation isn't pointy enough so I had to grind off everything and redo it fifteen times, and I hope you see this cause I had the same issues as other users,starting 20 ft tall but I could reach the settings, the innacuracy of things makes it hard to play and get things right, and in my opinion the progress is very slow for no real reason, and most of all I hope you guys haven't given up on this, because this game is a dream to me and many other users, so please don't write this game off as "spaghetti code" or move on to other games, this could be your golden child

This game is pretty cool, but there is a ton of improvements and tweeks that should be made to make it better.

The tools should stay at their tables after they have been initially retrieved. They always spawn at their original locations you get them with the tongs.

The metal needs a finer mesh, smaller polygons or something done to the metal to improve the accuracy of forging even rough shapes and for the grinding wheel because it keeps making jagged edges and tearing holes in the blade when you try to sharpen the edge even when its not red hot. 

The big hammer is crazy strong and even when hammering lightly, it can smash large chunks off the metal. A smaller hammer head for finer detail work would be a nice.

I love this, it’s fun learning how the game works and getting better at smithing! The only issue I have is after a few missions the merchant just stops giving requests and I’m left standing there to do whatever. I’ve reset and reinstalled to no avail. Please fix it! this game has so much potential and I’m thoroughly enjoying it. There’s another bug where my left controller starts to vibrate and then just doesn’t stop. I can’t replicate it so I don’t know what much to say on thst.

This game was super fun at the start but as soon as I got the copper started the merchant stopped bringing quests I waited for almost two hours for him to bring one and still nothing. Big bummer I was looking forward to smithing.

It's a cozy game I like the base it has but it's a tad difficult to make pointy weapons i end up with slashing weapons every time I see comments about weapon molds but that would be good late game but early game it would be nice to have a way to make the different types of weapons a bit easier

reviews.review_title: Great concept, execution could be better
reviews.review_description:
Some weapon moulds may go a long way. As I'm hammering it into a spearhead and it acts like a blunt object.

I've wanted a game exactly like this for so long. Some sort of fantasy shop where you create magical weapons. This comes so close.

However some mechanics like forging specific weapons needs a lot of work, maybe weapon molds would be the best option for that. The hammering and grinding as well needs work sometimes it takes off too much even if I tap the metal. Lastly the game itself doesn’t recognize a sharp point from a round stone, I spent too much time trying to make a spear head only to find it it was as blunt as a boulder. Other than that I can’t wait to see the game improve and get better.

I am up to the part where you get leather and I restarted 2 times and I kept getting stuck the merchant keeps glitching after I put his handle in the letter box and he won't move he just standing  there menacingly! But in all seriousness I don't know what to do it keeps glitching every time I restart or even make a new save file what do I do?

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We do apologize for the inconvenience and would love to help the best we can, to make sure you have an amazing experience!
Could you either send a mail to info@manabrigade.com or preferably join the discord and submit a bug report there so we can take a look at it? :)

reviews.review_description: Liking the game but have had to start over 3 times now as my 1kg stone some times floats in the air and it can't be used... could this pls be fixed ... plus I'm rubbish at making wood the same size and making metal spear heads 😆

The game has its issues specially with the wonky weapons and tools you make but if you spend time you can make your self something nice simple but nice.

I am not one for cosy vibing games but this was one I was able to relax in and have a good time.

If I am able to request a change for the game it would be;
Have the ability to change the width and depth of the ingot box, this will help make metal poles and handles and will help create the thickness for blades.

Apart from that its my go to game.

Thank you developers for making this game i'm really enjoying it

…until I got really tired of the chunk based hammering and grinding while just trying to make a sword for myself only to shave off too much and have to start over.

I never liked how I needed to whittle down this giant slab of metal just to make a long blade, in the future if you could add the option to make slimmer pieces of metal to work with or just add weapon molds that would be great.
It's a fun and cozy game, but there alot of bugs that make it unplayable.
I adore this game but it seems to be poorly built . My save file was destroyed twice, no adventure without progress...

2nd UPDATE- Forget this.. I STILL keep getting the exact same request over and over no matter how many times I complete it! EVERY time I reload my save, I just get it again EVERY. F****G. TIME!...
Emailing their support a fewvdays ago has also rewarded me with nothing. Not a single response.
So this buggy p.o.s. game is seemingly never getting fixed and the past updates/ patches apparently did absolutely nothing.
This studio has some great titles under them, but they dropped the ball hard on this game and absolutely do not care to fix it or respond to the issues, and give no mind to everyone who ends up WASTING their hard earned cash on this broken slop of a game!
SAVE YOUR MONEY!
I'm definitely fighting to get mine back for this crap.



1sr UPDATE- So I restarted the game for a third time, taking things slow again through the tutorials. It worked as it did on my first play through, with me noticing I didn't grab the hammer this time way before the tutorial got around to it possibly soft-locking it.
But now? I completed the Copper Mines request. Now had the metal to work with and 4 new requests. I saved and exited the game to take a break for the day.
I start it up again, still having everything and the 4 new requests waiting, but now the Copper Mines request is being delivered and talked about as if I never completed it.
I completed it again and saved-exited out of frustration.
Guess what happened & what request I got again for the THIRD time?!
......
..........
HOW after so many patches and updates is this game STILL so riddled with progress blocking bugs??!...

So though I thought I was enjoying it again, yet more issues pop up that still make me suggest skipping this title completely.
Apparently a handful of patches/ hot fixes aren't even going to help it...

OG- I played the game up to the third request after the tutorials. Worked (mostly) fine then, and really seemed like a game I will absolutely love.
I ended up starting over in the same day, speeding through the tutorials really quick to get back where I was before. I turned off my device to play something else for a few minutes and turned my Quest 3 off to charge it.
I come back, boot up the game, do the first two easy requests that you get immediately after the tutorials, annndd.... nothing.
I waited and waited. The big guy came andvwent 5 times! I turned the game off and tried again in hopes the issue wouldn't persist, and the big loaf came and went yet another 3 times, WASTING 15 minutes of my time with NOTHING to do but chop wood, pet the spirit, or twiddle my fu**f* thumbs for minutes at a time!
The mandatory waiting for more requests (and thus ability to actually play/ progress) is terrible to begin with, but this bug makes the game a complete waste of my time and money!!

I do NOT recommend this literally time wasting "game"!

Ill try ONE more time, but this seems like another refund request to happen.

developer_response.body:
Hello! We apologize for the frustration caused by this bug and your experience with the support mail. 

Regarding the issue with the copper mines. this issue has been worked on in Patch 7#. If the issue still persist after updating to the latest version, you can always join our Discord, link via manabrigade.com

reviews.review_description: I can’t even play the game none of the keys work at the very beginning of the game and now I’m out 15 bucks

developer_response.body:
Hello! 
We have updated this in the newest version, should be a lot smoother now!

If this doesn't work, please contact support@fasttravelgames.com and submit a full bug report to help us solve your problem.

reviews.review_description:
I guess I'm old fashioned assuming a game is able to be played at launch but this isn't. Needs another year in development at this rate. 

Things are poorly explained. Tutorials suck. 

Controls work poorly. Frequently requires repeated actions until a mechanic decides to work. 

Game frequently crashes.  

Axe is invisible when you first launch the game.

reviews.review_title: Forced to play this trash so here goes
reviews.review_description:
My refund was denied so i have to play this terrible game so i feel like i didn’t completely waste my money. 

First off, the lighting in the forge sucks. i can’t see what i’m working on. 

Second, the game crashes every 10 minutes causing lost progress and wasted time. 

Third, it’s difficult to get nice looking and accurate pieces of metal. the hammer is completely hit or miss and the grindstone sucks. all my pieces look terrible because i can’t make small adjustments or straight lines and I CANT SEE. 

The smelter not working is due to too much metal in the workshop. I keep getting requests to make things heavier… but how much copper can i fit on one weapon.. this game is a buggy, unenjoyable mess that shouldn’t be on the mega store. 

All in all, this game could be enjoyable but i don’t imagine that the devs care or are going to fix anything.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 
The lightning in the forge, some crash bugs and the ability to remove overflowing metal in the forge has been worked on for 1.0.52! Hopefully this resolves some of the issues you have mentioned! :) 

Regarding tools, we are in progress in balancing them so they feel nice to use. :)

reviews.review_description: The game has crashed  on me several  times. I can not wrap the merchants  club with the leather  wrap . Metal crafting  is very  difficult  and needs a total  rework.  This game has potential  to be great but it needs a lot of work. I can only  give it a 2 star rating  until you guys make some patches  and improvements.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 
Issues with the leather wrapping has been worked on during the latest patches. 
If the problem still occurs after updating please let us know via our Discord, link found on our website manabrigade.com or email support@fasttravelgames.com :)

reviews.review_description: One of the only forging games out there right now. Yes it has this glitches. Yes it has its problems but it’s calming fun and all around and enjoyable game 10 out of 10 would suggest.
First day of release, 34 minutes in, and my initial take is that it feels like a Vr game, very fun, would recommend.

developer_response.body:
Hiya!

Oooh, thanks a lot for the five stars and nice words! :D

reviews.review_description: Love the idea of a vr blacksmith game, but this could use a lot of polish. The detection for whether a weapon is blunt or slashing needs work, feels like if a solid ingot has even one edge it gets considered a slashing weapon even when it's still 99% a block
I was having fun with this game, but when I do the Lost Pickaxes job it completely kicks me out of the game when I try to pick up the note to put in the mailbox to complete the job.

Its a fun experience and had progressed a bit and lost all of it and had to restart everything and keeps crashing it took me all day to progress to the shop and half of the orb and lost all of it and i had the clay brush bit lost it too but over all it giod but really annouying bugs

Please make all metals have all 3 weapon types, i cant get a new metal because the goblin order for it keeps saying “make it sharper” when i’ve tried for 3 hours and i cant make it into a slash weapon

I like this game but I'm stuck and can't do anything. The man has stopped bringing quests and I have no more on the board and he comes back and leaves over and over with still no new quests. I can't do anything but mess around with whatever and I'm upset because I am missing so much of the story I just started using copper!!

developer_response.body: Hello! This issue has been resolved with HotFix 3# :)

reviews.review_description: Awesome game don’t get me wrong but I guess I missed a part and now there’s symbols under the copper and everytime I try to put it in the caldron there’s a X not really sure what to do, any advice?

developer_response.body:
Hello!

The red X indicates that there's too much metal out in the forge (for performance’s sake, we limit this). 

There was a bug where you couldn't remove metal, but a fix for that will go live today. So just hammer out the metal pieces that aren't used, and the red X should disappear! 

Feel free to send a mail to support@fasttravelgames.com or ping a message to the BlackForge discord if the problem persists! 

Have a lovely day! :)

reviews.review_description: Game would not start.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
The issue causing the game to crash on startup has been worked on for version 1.0.55 Hotfix!

reviews.review_description: Really great game other than the fact that when it bugs you out of the game it glitches so that the main quest letter disappears. This means that I get no new or progressive letters. Can there be a feature added to help go back on a previous important quest so that I can continue? Highly recommended otherwise.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Sorry to hear that this bugs prevents your progression in the game! We will look into it ASAP.

You are welcome to join the discord server , link at manabrigade.com, and we are able to help you even faster.

reviews.review_description: I would be able to write a better review if I could open the door in the very beginning of the game. I can't figure out how I have grabbed a key and tried to open the door but it doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 
We have updated this in the newest version, give it a try! :)

If this doesn't work, please contact support@fasttravelgames.com and submit a full bug report to help us solve your problem.

reviews.review_title: Decent Game with tons of options, but...
reviews.review_description:
The game crashes a lot, especially when trying to hammer and grind out imperfections.
The requirements to complete quests are too strict (i.e. You make a spear that's just barely too long, and it gets sent back stating to make it shorter)
The difference between sharp and blunt is down to a polygon.

reviews.review_title: One thing is stopping me from playing.
reviews.review_description: ￼ I really liked this game, but I can’t make sharp items. No matter how round I get the tip or how flat it is, is always registers it as pointy or blunt. It really sucked because I do like this game a lot. Maybe try tweaking that?

This game is enjoyable but it's not that easy to craft specific type weapons there should be a casting mechanic where you are able to put a cast where you create ingots to get a certain weapon type started

I love this game waited for it for a while but kinda disappointed I played it for an hour or two them longed back on and my special hammer is on the rack visibly but unable to be grabbed and my copper disappears when poured in the cauldron pls fix I really like this game
I cannot trade with the npc when I point it doesn’t select it it was great until this

After 2 hours of gameplay it's unbelievably obvious this was rushed, the Merchant doesn't hold his cart right the wheels don't move and the lathe sucks along with many other things. I've only gotten to the actual smithing part just to be faced with a extremely poor attempt at molding the metal. I'm truly frustrated with the game and it's lack of care for the art.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Merchant cart animation has been fixed for the latest patches.
We have done some balancing regarding the lathe station and the smithing. :) 

More balancing is in the works aswell. 
Hope this helps :)

reviews.review_description: I've been waiting for this game to release gor a while now, and I have to say, it did not dissapoint. I will say one thing, if your thinking of picking up this game, go slowly, don't try to rush through it, as the whole point of the game is to use your creativity to make awesome weapons and tools. The gameplay will be slow in the beginning, but it really ramps up once you unlock more mechanics of the game. All in all, definitly a perfect game for someone who just wants to relax to the sound of hammers falling and fire burning.

developer_response.body:
Hi Grimheart!

Thanks a ton for those lovely words! <3

reviews.review_description: Loving this game and the freedom we have with making tools, but I’ve run into a game stopping bug Which involves the leather, everytime I try to buy it it won’t show up in my forge and I can’t make the current orders cause they need leather, wishing yall the best and hope for more improvements

It's good in some point but there has been bugs for example u put an item in the mail and ur vr just decided to crash (it happened few times with me) ur item that u craft has been deleted into the void as never seen again for u have start ur hard work all over again and now it's buggy with the smelter for appear a x mark for the smelter isn't full but I give the dev fix the issues.  Also I would like to able put hot metal copper into carver machine due I wanted round handle but the freedom isn't perfectly there. I would give the game 2.5 out of 5, the game is been buggy ever since I started for I do mind the bug issues how things started but I am willing give the dev a chance fix the bugs roaming around

developer_response.body:
Hello!
The crash specifically happening when putting a quest in the mailbox has been resolved in the latest patch! 
Together with letting you to clean up the forge from overflowing metal pieces, you can use the incinerator or Clean Forge button found by your ore supply.

We are working on a fix for the carver machine so metal ingots can spin more freely :)

reviews.review_description:
The hammer helps but find every time doing points it just breaks the wood
Or metal up 

Glitching with post box making you go upside down now and then glitches and quits ***********

Great game lots got fixed that makes it so much fun!!!
Almost 5 because I glitched the game and finished a quest before I started it, which caused me to leave and rejoin.
